overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a vast moonlit field of purple irises. Misty mountains loom in the background under a bright full moon, creating a serene, atmospheric scene with cool blue and purple tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: moonlit flower field with misty mountains

agents.ego_description: The samurai walks slowly through the dense field of purple flowers, moving steadily toward the mist-shrouded mountains in the distance while the camera follows from behind.

entered.detail: Bright full moon high in the night sky casting cool silver light across the landscape
Dark silhouetted mountain range partially obscured by low-lying fog and atmospheric mist
Dense field of blooming purple irises covering the ground in all directions
Dark silhouettes of distant trees on the left horizon
Low-lying mist drifting between the flower field and the mountain base

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks through a vast open field of purple flowers under a bright full moon. Misty mountains rise in the distance beyond drifting fog layers, while scattered trees mark the left horizon. The atmosphere is serene and untouched, with cool moonlight illuminating the dense floral landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene, moonlit landscape of purple irises that stretches toward distant, misty peaks. It begins by tracking a samurai walking through the vast open field, where the cool glow of a bright full moon illuminates the dense floral terrain. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal drifting layers of fog that partially veil the horizon. The scene then shifts focus toward the background, where scattered trees mark the left edge of the field before the gaze settles on the towering, atmospheric mountains rising under the night sky.
